creator: samm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please, roll back this commit. I did not approved this patch.
I have revised version of this patch, which i created this morning, but 
then, while looking in the PR i saw that it was approved w/o my 
agreement.  Revises and correct version of the patch attached.

-- 
Best regards,
Alex Samorukov, SAMM1-RIPE
Zend Certified PHP Engineer
